series_metadata.series_description: Daily reports that are compiled to verify that the Accounting department received corresponding paperwork for all the outgoing wire transfers made against the State Regular account and that such wire transfers were processed according to the original request. The packet contains the outgoing wire report, a transaction detail report derived from the investment inventory software, and a spreadsheet used to compare these reports with the paperwork received from the Treasury Services department.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year 1 additional fiscal year. ; Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year 1 additional fiscal year
